data.current_description: Read a page of carts. Control what is returned via the `properties` query param.
data.summary_suggestion: List carts with pagination and property filtering
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a paginated list of carts from your CRM. Use the `properties` query parameter to specify which cart properties to return in the response. Supports filtering, sorting, and pagination through query parameters. Returns a page of SimplePublicObject records containing the requested cart data.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks details about pagination support, return type, and filtering capabilities. Enhanced version clarifies pagination, property selection, and response format for better AI agent understanding of when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'post-/crm/v3/objects/carts/batch/upsert' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description lacks details about response format, HTTP status codes (200 vs 207), and how partial failures are handled. Enhanced version clarifies batch processing behavior, return types, and status codes for better AI agent understanding of operation outcomes.

data.current_summary: Create and update a batch of carts by unique property
data.current_description: Create and update a batch of carts by a unique property. Carts that don't exist will be created, while existing carts will be updated.
data.description_suggestion: Create and update a batch of carts by a unique property identifier. Carts that don't exist will be created with the provided properties, while existing carts will be updated with new values. Accepts a batch input object containing multiple cart records. Returns a batch response indicating success or failure status for each record, with HTTP 200 for all successful operations or HTTP 207 for partial success with errors.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description lacks details about response format, HTTP status codes (200 vs 207), and how partial failures are handled. Enhanced version clarifies batch processing behavior, return types, and status codes for better AI agent understanding of operation outcomes.

data.current_description: Archives a batch of cart by ID. Archived carts can be restored within 90 days of deletion. Learn more about [restoring records](https://knowledge.hubspot.com/records/restore-deleted-records).
data.description_suggestion: Archive a batch of carts by ID. Archived carts can be restored within 90 days of archival. The `inputs` array should contain cart IDs to be archived. Learn more about [restoring records](https://knowledge.hubspot.com/records/restore-deleted-records).
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and appropriate. Description has a grammatical error ('batch of cart' should be 'batch of carts') and lacks clarity about input structure. Improved version clarifies the input format and corrects the terminology for better AI agent understanding.
